title: Golan space colony

[[File:SpaceColony1-XWA-render.jpg|250px|thumb|Golan Space Colony 1]]
The '''Golan space colonies''' were a series of [[Space station/Legends|space stations]] built by [[Golan Arms/Legends|Golan Arms]] for civilian usage.
